hero.tagline: From Meknes to the world — Management, Commerce, IT and Hospitality & Tourism. Moroccan state accredited degrees, recognized in Europe.

pillars.title: Excellence within everyone's reach
pillars.lead: Six concrete commitments that structure our pedagogy and our support.

pillar_0.title: Double FR-MA degree
pillar_0.text: Degrees accredited by the Moroccan State and recognized in France via our European partners.

pillar_1.title: Practical pedagogy
pillar_1.text: Professional teachers from the field, real projects and supervised internships.

pillar_2.title: European network
pillar_2.text: FEDE, WES'SUP and partner institutions guarantee international mobility.

pillar_3.title: Personalized follow-up
pillar_3.text: Individual support from registration to professional integration.

pillar_4.title: Campus in the new city
pillar_4.text: Rooms equipped for collaborative work and professional practice.

pillar_5.title: Professional integration
pillar_5.text: More than 90% of our graduates in activity within 6 months.

schools.title: Two schools, one standard of excellence
schools.lead: Choose your path within accredited and internationally recognized institutions.

school_0.name: School of Management, Commerce & IT
school_0.short: Management, Finance, Marketing, Human Resources, International Trade and IT.

school_1.name: School of Hospitality & Tourism
school_1.short: Train for careers in tourism, hospitality and international hotel management.

showcase.title: A training for every ambition
showcase.lead: Bac+2 to Bac+8 — choose from our accredited and recognized programs in Europe.

testimonials.title: They tell their success stories
testimonials.lead: Our graduates testify to their journey and their professional integration.

Mehdi B..quote: EEMCI gave me a solid training and a double degree that made the difference in interviews.

Salma K..quote: The supervised internships and the school's network allowed me to secure a position in a major bank.

Youssef M..quote: Graduated in International Trade, I am an Export Manager in an agribusiness company. The courses were aligned with the real needs of the market.

Leila T..quote: Thanks to the Bachelor in Digital Marketing, I now manage the entire social media strategy of a fast-growing startup. EEMCI is concrete!

Omar R..quote: My Master's in Computer Science propelled me to IT Project Manager. The supervision from teachers was top level.

partners.title: A European & Professional Network
partners.lead: Academic, industrial and institutional partnerships that validate the quality of our training and open doors internationally.

accreditation.title: Degrees recognized by the Moroccan State and Europe
accreditation.desc: Our programs are accredited by the Ministry of National Education of Morocco and recognized in Europe via our FEDE partners.

ctaband.title: Ready to give a new direction to your future?
ctaband.lead: 2026 Intake open. Submit your application in less than 10 minutes.
